title: Viners Barware Brushed Silver Cocktail Shaker, 500ml
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | This silver colour cocktail shaker is indispensable for any entertainer and a stylish addition to any home bar. Use it to create your own signature cocktails. The elegant gift box makes it the perfect gift for any occasion.

SIZE | For the true cocktail enthusiast or mixologist, this is the ideal cocktail shaker. The lid creates an airtight seal and has an integral strainer. The 500ml capacity is enough for mixing one to two drinks.
DURABILITY | Made from fine-quality stainless steel, our drink mixer is strong with a brushed finish that won't scuff easily or tarnish. Hand wash only without using abrasive sponges.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from cocktail shakers to stirrers and bottle openers

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest materials.

Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting.
